criteria.completeness: All requested sections and elements are present with no placeholder text remaining
criteria.accuracy: All stated facts, numbers, and references are correct and verifiable against source data
criteria.tone: Register matches the context (formal/casual) with no inappropriately aggressive or passive language
criteria.actionability: Contains a clear next step or call-to-action that the user can act on immediately
criteria.format: Follows the expected output structure and is appropriate length for context
criteria.hallucination: No fabricated entities, events, or data points — all claims supported by provided context
